title: Logic Script Compilation & Execution
compilation_flow: START: User code string available in LogicBuild.code
LogicBuild calls LAssembler.assemble(code, privileged)
LAssembler.assemble() calls LAssembler.read(data, privileged)
LAssembler.read() creates new LParser(text, privileged) and calls parse()
LParser.parse(): clear jumps & jumpLocations, loop over chars while pos < length && line < maxInstructions(1000)
[branch] char == '\n' / ';' / ' ' → skip (pos++)
[branch] char == '\r' → pos += 2
[default] → call statement()
statement(): tokenize line into tokens[] (max 16 tokens)
[branch] tok==0 → discard blank line
[branch] tok==1 && token ends with ':' → store jumpLocations[label] = line
[else] checkRead() applies legacy op-name renames (atan2→angle, dst→len)
[branch] tokens[0]=='jump' && tokens[1] is a label → store JumpIndex for deferred resolution
LogicIO.read(tokens, tok) → LStatement (or null)
[branch] st == null && LAssembler.customParsers has key → custom mod parser
[branch] !privileged && st.privileged() → replace with InvalidStatement
[branch] st == null → add InvalidStatement
statements.add(st); line++
After loop: resolve jump labels → set JumpStatement.destIndex from jumpLocations map
[branch] label not found → throw RuntimeException('Undefined jump location')
LParser.parse() returns Seq<LStatement>
LAssembler maps each LStatement.build(asm) → LInstruction (null results filtered out)
LAssembler.var(symbol) resolution for each operand:
[branch] Vars.logicVars.get(symbol) != null → return global const LVar
[branch] symbol starts/ends with '"' → create string-constant LVar
[branch] parseDouble() succeeds → create numeric-constant LVar (hex/binary/color supported)
[else] putVar(symbol) → create/reuse mutable LVar
LAssembler.assemble() returns populated LAssembler (vars map + instructions[])
loading_flow: Copy non-constant vars from asm.vars → executor.vars[], assign sequential ids
per_tick_execution_loop: Cap accumulator: if accumulator > maxInstructionScale * ipt → accumulator = maxInstructionScale * ipt
accumulator += edelta() * ipt  [fractional instruction budget accrues over time]
instruction_dispatch_branches: EndI.run()     → counter.numval = instructions.length (force end-of-program next cycle wrap)
JumpI.run()    → if condition(comp0,comp1) satisfied: counter.numval = address
WaitI.run()    → if time elapsed: continue; else: counter.numval-- (re-execute), yield=true
OpI.run()      → dest = op.function(a, b) or op.objFunction2(a,b) if both objects
PrintI.run()   → append value to exec.textBuffer (string or number formatting)
PrintFlushI.run() → flush textBuffer to target MessageBlock
UnitBindI.run() → bind next unit of UnitType from team cache to exec.unit
OpI.run() (equal op) → compare a==b by value or object identity
ControlI.run() → send control command to target Building/Unit
DrawI.run()    → push draw command to exec.graphicsBuffer
RadarI.run()   → search for nearest/farthest unit matching filters

key_data_structures.LVar: name:String, numval:double, objval:Object, isobj:boolean, constant:boolean, id:int
key_data_structures.LExecutor.fields: instructions:LInstruction[], vars:LVar[], counter/unit/thisv/ipt:LVar, yield:boolean, accumulator owned by LogicBuild, graphicsBuffer:LongSeq, textBuffer:StringBuilder, links:Building[], team:Team

key_relationships: LParser produces Seq<LStatement> consumed by LAssembler
LStatement is abstract; LStatements inner classes are concrete implementations
LExecutor.load(LAssembler) transfers assembled state into executor
LogicIO.read(tokens,tok) maps token arrays → LStatement instances
conditions_and_guards: maxInstructions = 1000 (hard parse limit enforced by LParser)
privileged flag gates access to privileged LStatements
executor.yield breaks tick loop early (used by WaitI)
accumulator budget caps at maxInstructionScale * ipt per tick
static_script_execution: Assembles inline, then loops up to maxInstructions calling runOnce()
Breaks if counter out of bounds (non-loop mode) or yield==true
important_notes: Two execution contexts: (1) in-world LogicBuild processor — tick-rate limited by ipt/accumulator, stateful across ticks; (2) runLogicScript() static helper for one-shot scripted events. Variable resolution happens at assemble-time (LAssembler.var()); runtime LVars are pre-resolved references. Jump label resolution is deferred to end of parse, allowing forward references.
